NODE_START.speaker: Bruder
NODE_START.text: Na, bist du endlich bereit für deine Feier?

NODE_ROUTE_CONFIDENT.speaker: You
NODE_ROUTE_CONFIDENT.text: I was off-duty, sleeping inside the lower sub-barracks section. Check your internal check-in logs.

NODE_ROUTE_APOLOGETIC.speaker: You
NODE_ROUTE_APOLOGETIC.text: I... I honestly can't recall. Everything was a massive blur of emergency smoke and flashing red tactical sirens...

NODE_FUNNEL_CONVERGE.speaker: Interrogator
NODE_FUNNEL_CONVERGE.text: Hmph. Either way, you're hiding critical data. Cooperate with core command now, or face immediate containment.

choices.text: Stand your ground and prepare for defensive combat.
Submit quietly and accept life containment.

NODE_BRIDGE_TRUE.speaker: Interrogator
NODE_BRIDGE_TRUE.text: What?! How did you acquire these classified blueprints? Fine... you've completely forced my hand. Follow me out back.

choices.text: Step into the True Route storyline...
